LightningComponentBundle.description: Pro-code payment form — a drop-in replacement for a payment Flow screen. Supports one-time and recurring payments with configurable currency and frequency toggle.

property.name: currency
property.label: Currency
property.description: ISO currency code shown in the amount picker (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP).

property.name: hideFrequency
property.label: Hide Frequency Toggle
property.description: Hide the one-time / recurring frequency selector. By default the toggle is visible.

property.name: defaultFrequency
property.label: Default Frequency
property.description: Pre-selected frequency when the form loads.
